Home / Automation & Workflows / Huginn

Huginn — open source alternative

Self-hosted "agents" that watch, scrape, and act.

Strengths

  • Built for IFTTT-style feed monitoring and actions.
  • Huge agent library for feeds, weather, email.
  • Long-running, stable project.

Weaknesses

  • Ruby/Rails stack can feel heavy.
  • UI is functional, not polished.
  • Not beginner-friendly.
License: MIT Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Self-host only

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Huginn is used as an alternative to

Zapier

Connect thousands of apps with no-code automations.

See all alternatives →

Make (formerly Integromat)

Visual automation builder.

See all alternatives →

IFTTT

Consumer-focused automation for smart home and services.

See all alternatives →
